def negative_instrumentation_helper_mutates_business_return_shape():
    rule_id = "instrumentation_helper_mutates_business_return_shape"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag instrumentation wrappers that alter the shape of business return values."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
